'''House AlGray''' was a powerful [[Noble/Legends|noble]] family of the [[Hapes Consortium/Legends|Hapes Consortium]]. Based in the [[Relephon Moons]], they controlled a dozen [[Hapan Battle Dragon|Battle Dragons]]. In [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], under [[AlGray|Ducha AlGray]], they allied with the [[Heritage Council]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]'' {{1st}}
